curation.synopsis: Deep in the void, the Alpha Legion maintains a covert installation called Tenebrae 9-50 — a pylon array capable of manipulating the warp itself, and the quiet reason the White Scars on Chondax remained cut off from word of the Heresy. When a security leak is reported, Omegon assembles a small, hand-picked strike team to infiltrate the station and plug the breach permanently. What unfolds is a tightly-wound infiltration where every door is locked the wrong way, every operative may be running a separate orders set, and the truth of who Omegon really serves — Alpharius, Horus, the Emperor, or no one — is a question the team's survivors will have to answer for themselves.
